title: Speedboat Hire Licence in Benalmadena Marina No: Guide & Costs 2026
html:
For a speedboat hire licence in Benalmadena Marina No you can explore the Costa del Sol without a permit if you rent a boat under 15hp or join a guided tour. Prices for licence-free skippered boats start from around €250 for a half-day trip. BoatHire24 lists verified options so you can compare and book with confidence.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Benalmadena Marina No?

In Spain you do not need a licence for boats under 15 horsepower or when a skipper is included in the rental. Most licence-free hires at Benalmadena Marina No provide a qualified captain who handles navigation so you can relax. The operator confirms exact requirements at booking so there are no surprises. You can rent a boat in a few minutes.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Benalmadena Marina No?

Prices range from €120 for a shared tour to €800 for a full-day catamaran charter with crew. The cost depends on boat size, season and duration. You can rent a boat such as a small motorboat for a half-day from €250, or a crewed yacht for a full day from €600. For the most accurate pricing check current listings on BoatHire24. One option worth a look is the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open - 150 HP for hire.

  • Shared tour: from €120 per person for 2 hours
  • Small motorboat half-day: from €250 for 4 hours
  • Catamaran full-day: from €600 for up to 12 guests
  • Crewed yacht full-day: from €800 for up to 10 guests

Where to set off in Benalmadena Marina No

The departure point is typically Benalmadena Marina No itself, a modern harbour with easy parking and amenities. Nearby marinas include Puerto Marina Benalmádena and Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola, both offering boat access. You can also set off from Málaga Marina or the port of Torremolinos for longer excursions. Popular destinations within a short cruise are the Bay of Fuengirola and the coast towards Cala del Moral. A trip from Benalmadena Marina No to Marbella covers about 25 nautical miles one way. You can also see more at check availability.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small motorboat (up to 6 guests), ideal for a quick spin along the coast, from €250 half-day
  2. Speedboat such as the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open, 150 HP for hire, perfect for thrill-seekers who want agility and speed, from €350 half-day; the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open, 150 HP for hire is a popular choice on BoatHire24.
  3. Catamaran (up to 12 guests), spacious and stable, suitable for families and groups, from €600 full-day
  4. Crewed yacht (up to 10 guests), luxury option with skipper and crew, from €800 full-day
  5. RIBs (up to 8 guests), versatile and fast, great for coastal exploration, from €300 half-day

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Benalmadena Marina No or list your own. For more details on how to book, read how boat rental works on the site. To see how booking works, visit how boat rental works.

When to visit Benalmadena Marina No for boating

The best months are June through September when the Mediterranean is calm and warm. During July and August the local wind, the Poniente, can pick up in the afternoon but generally remains manageable. Spring and early autumn also offer good conditions with fewer crowds.

Tip: book your boat in the morning to enjoy the calmest sea conditions and avoid the afternoon breeze that often builds by 2pm.

At a glance

  • Price band: €120, €800 per rental
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Guest capacity: 2, 12 passengers
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Benalmadena Marina No

Can I drive a speedboat without a licence in Benalmadena Marina No?

Yes, you can drive a boat under 15hp without a licence, but most rentals below that threshold also include a skipper for safety.

What is the minimum age to hire a boat in Benalmadena Marina No?

The minimum age is usually 18 with a valid ID, though some operators allow younger passengers with an adult present.

How far is Marbella from Benalmadena Marina No by sea?

Marbella is approximately 25 nautical miles southwest, a trip of about 1.5 hours at cruising speed.

Do I need to bring my own life jacket?

No, life jackets are always provided by the boat operator and are included in the rental price.

Whether you are a first-time renter or a seasoned boater, Benalmadena Marina No offers plenty of licence-free options. Check availability on BoatHire24 to compare boats and book your trip. If you own a boat, consider listing it to reach thousands of travellers.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Benalmadena Marina No and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
